item.title: Albanese teases public holiday if Australia wins FIFA World Cup
item.description: Socceroos fever has gripped the nation.

item.title: Hunt for mystery shooter as two Kosciuszko brumbies killed separate to sanctioned cull
item.description: Police are investigating the deaths that were ‘not part of any authorised NPWS control program’.

item.title: Australia’s ‘cheapest’ capital city CBD home sells at auction in Adelaide
item.description: The quaint one-bedroom property might need more than a lick of paint.

item.title: Ukrainian woman disguised as a man is main suspect in Monaco attack
item.description: A Ukrainian tycoon was the target of the attack and was wounded in the explosion.

item.title: Millions of Australians are treating back pain wrong, new research reveals
item.description: Back pain is one of the leading causes of disability worldwide.

item.title: Mission to save NASA telescope that's falling to Earth
item.description: ‘This is a high-risk, high-reward mission.’

item.title: Global Lebanese community ‘traumatised’ by horror conflict between Israel and Hezbollah
item.description: ‘Everyone knows someone who has been affected.’

item.title: The simple tech mistakes keeping families apart and how to fix it
item.description: ‘The more people you talk to, especially within your own family unit about what’s going on, the more help you can get.’

item.title: Jury duty explained: What really happens behind closed doors as 12 ordinary Australians decide someone’s fate
item.description: Jurors face confronting evidence, strict social media rules and the weight of deciding another person’s future.

item.title: Chemical risk prompts major response after mystery space objects wash up at Forrest Beach in Queensland
item.description: Authorities are keeping locals away from the beach until the mysterious cannisters can be removed.

item.title: Extreme heat disrupts Fourth of July celebrations across US
item.description: US authorities were forced to cancel numerous 250th anniversary celebrations around the country as a ‘heat-dome’ endangers people’s health.

item.title: Aussies warned not to panic as state confirms first case of bird flu
item.description: NSW says there is no evidence of spread to wildlife from the now confirmed case.

item.title: Venezuela earthquake: Owner finds beloved dog after it was trapped in rubble for days
item.description: ‘With all the tragedy of the earthquake, it’s one positive thing in all the bad.’

item.title: Is your child devastated the Socceroos lost? Here’s how to help
item.description: Australia’s heart-wrenching loss in the World Cup could be an opportunity to help children strengthen their emotional regulation skills.

item.title: Week-long funeral ceremony begins in Iran for slain leader Ali Khamenei
item.description: Crowds and clerics weeped as the zealot’s body lay in state.

item.title: Neil the seal wreaks havoc as experts warn of ‘loving him to death’
item.description: The state’s favourite elephant seal could be in danger of being euthanised.

item.title: Frank Green founder celebrates selling 28 million reusable bottles to Australians
item.description: The man behind the empire has revealed why demand for designer hydration has never been hotter.

item.title: Wallabies suffer gut-wrenching loss to Ireland after Ben Donaldson misses late penalty goals
item.description: ‘I can live with him missing that because he wasn’t scared at the moment.’

item.title: Sarcoma diagnosis: The deadly cancer that survivors say is easy to miss
item.description: Sam Mathias was 22, finishing university and getting ready to start his career when he felt ‘little niggles’ in his lungs and shoulder. It turned out to be one of Australia's deadliest yet least recognised cancers.

item.title: Severe thunderstorms spark evacuation during America’s 250th anniversary celebrations at the National Mall in Washington DC
item.description: Organisers issued evacuation orders in Washington DC as storms gathered with the US president declaring the wild weather would ‘bring luck’.

item.title: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding venue sparked controversy — but it may have been their only option
item.description: From handwritten vows and celebrity guests to the reason New York’s Madison Square Garden was perhaps the only venue that made sense, here’s everything we know about America’s ‘Royal Wedding’.

item.title: She won gold for her country. Now a cut to her NDIS plan has stripped her of independence
item.description: Mum-of-two Tracey Barrell OAM has been stripped of support to be able to shower or eat lunch under her new government plan.

item.title: Space mystery deepens with two more metal orbs found on Forrest Beach in north Queensland
item.description: A 50-metre exclusion zone remains active around the area.

item.title: Why Farmer Wants A Wife’s Alex left the show early with Eddy
item.description: Everything changed after Rachel discovered Eddy’s letter — a moment the farmer believes became the turning point.

item.title: Fridayz Live announces touring event will not take place in 2026
item.description: It is the second major festival to pull the plug in recent days.

item.title: University of Glasgow study finds sitting more than half an hour raises cancer death risk
item.description: There are some easy ways to combat the risk.

item.title: Aussie champions robbed of T20 World Cup moment after ‘insane’ delay for musical performance
item.description: Lord’s was emptied before the trophy presentation following one of cricket’s most baffling decisions yet.

item.title: World No.1 Aryna Sabalenka ‘to go and get drunk’ after shock Wimbledon exit against Naomi Osaka
item.description: The top seed was left screaming in frustration as rejuvenated champion Naomi Osaka dominated

item.title: Best lunchtime snack: Oporto drops limited-edition Porto roll and mozzarella sticks
item.description: Tastes like a slice of Europe.

item.title: Anthony Albanese apologises for Kylie Minogue ‘shag, marry, date’ comments
item.description: The PM has been accused of making a ‘mockery of Labor’s claim to be champions of women’.

item.title: Melissa George: Perth-born actress secretly welcomes fourth child aged 49 as she enjoys life in France
item.description: The TV and film actress has very quietly expanded her young family as she lives abroad.

item.title: Taylor Swift's wedding joy shattered by former guard's death
item.description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce's extravagant wedding celebrations at Madison Square Garden have been marred by some heartbreaking news for the superstar.

item.title: MasterChef favourite Sumeet Saigal puts an Indian twist on the classic Sunday roast
item.description: Give your Sunday roast an Indian-inspired twist.

item.title: Warm up with Chef Mel’s slow-cooked beef ragu and creamy lemon pepper polenta
item.description: The Happy Chef reveals the secrets to creating tender, flavour-packed beef ragu at home.

item.title: Take your roast dinner to the next level with Elliot Styche’s perfect Yorkshire puddings
item.description: The Great Australian Bake Off finalist reveals the simple tricks that guarantee perfectly risen Yorkshire puddings every time.

item.title: OTTO Sydney head chef Richard Ptacnik shares the secrets to perfect handmade raviolo
item.description: Handmade pasta, rich fillings and classic Italian flavours come together in this comforting winter dish.

item.title: Novak Djokovic goes past Roger Federer on all-time Wimbledon win list as quarter-final beckons
item.description: The Serbian legend has broken new ground at Wimbledon and now stands alone at the top.

item.title: Australia and Fiji strike historic new defence and climate alliance
item.description: ‘This level of ambition is possible because Australia and Fiji are Vuvale – family.’

item.title: Minority commuters face white supremacists gathering for Independence Day rallies in uncomfortable photos
item.description: Hundreds of masked men chanted ‘reclaim America’ as they marched in Washington, DC.

item.title: Officials confirm China fired long range missile test in South Pacific Ocean
item.description: The Australian Government was informed on Monday that China was preparing to do a long range missile test.

item.title: WA Labor minister Paul Papalia quits politics to support family member with serious illness
item.description: The veteran MP’s resignation will trigger a cabinet shake-up and by-election.

item.title: Deadly clashes break out at prison in Negombo, Sri Lanka
item.description: The clashes began on Sunday in the Sri Lankan coastal town of Negombo.

item.title: AFL ‘in denial’ as tensions with umpires reach boiling point following Brayden Maynard call
item.description: The situation has escalated after Brayden Maynard escaped suspension for making contact with an official.

item.title: Ally leaves Farmer Wants A Wife: Is this the end for her and farmer Dylan?
item.description: Sheep farmer Dylan made one final plea when the cameras weren’t rolling.

item.title: Local footballer Nathan Fitzgerald tragically dies after freak accident playing for Epping
item.description: The 27-year-old was placed in end-of-life care on Sunday after being rushed to hospital the previous day.

item.title: John Longmire among 10 to be contacted as Essendon begin process for next coach
item.description: The Bombers are casting a wide net despite all the talk being around two former players.

item.title: Donald Trump admits to calling FIFA chief over World Cup referee’s red card call
item.description: ‘All I did was ask for a review.’

item.title: Countdown is on for 2026 Rugby League World Cup
item.description: The blockbuster tournament will be live and free on Seven and 7plus.

item.title: Shattered Alex de Minaur ‘not good enough mentally’ after latest Wimbledon failure
item.description: ‘It breaks me inside. That’s the reality of it.’

item.title: Death toll from Venezuela quakes continues to rise as thousands remain displaced
item.description: Almost 18,000 people are still homeless more than a week after twin earthquakes struck the country’s capital and nearby coastal regions.

item.title: Hamas relinquishes control over Gaza Strip in major step towards peace with Israel
item.description: The terror group has ruled the enclave for almost two decades.

item.title: Former NRL player Jai Arrow marries long-time partner Berina in secret ceremony
item.description: The much-loved NRL great tied the knot in a ‘special’ elopement, months after his devastating diagnosis.

item.title: Portugal superstar Cristiano Ronaldo torched after teary World Cup exit: ‘He did nothing’
item.description: ‘He’s waddling around the field like a grandad, that’s why Portugal are out.’

item.title: Spotlight | 7NEWS

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.title: Sunrise: Australia's No. 1 Breakfast Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.title: 7NEWS live updates: US strikes Iran after three ships attacked in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Shocking footage captures moment of explosion in Damascus as France's Macron visits Syria
item.description: Explosions have rocked the capital as French President Emmanuel Macron met his Syrian counterpart in a landmark visit.

item.title: Evacuation orders in place as New York high-rise on verge of collapse
item.description: Mayor Zohran Mamdani said the situation is being assessed ‘minute-by-minute’.

item.title: Lionel Messi inspires stunning World Cup comeback over Egypt despite missed penalty
item.description: The Argentinian legend has outdone himself again, even after a rare moment of fault.

item.title: Belgium players mock Donald Trump by imitating US president’s viral dance from 2024 election
item.description: ‘A lot has happened off the pitch over the last two days.’

item.title: Hundreds of snakes on the loose as wild weather in China kills 17
item.description: Authorities are using nets and stun guns to catch the snakes.

item.title: Novak Djokovic blows up at Wimbledon officials during five-hour epic: ‘You have no idea’
item.description: ‘You’re so proud of your rules and you’re not sticking to any kind of rules.’

item.title: Mexican national shot dead by ICE officers during operation in Houston
item.description: ‘This is not an isolated event across the nation.’

item.title: Egypt star Mostafa Zico accuses FIFA of ‘fixing’ World Cup as Lionel Messi conspiracy theory explodes
item.description: The governing body’s latest move has sparked another storm and fans claim they are ‘not even hiding it anymore’.

item.title: Epping announce public farewell for beloved teammate Nathan Fitzgerald
item.description: The grief-stricken team has backed out of their scheduled match to spend the day mourning.

item.title: Blues look back in quest for Origin success in decider
item.description: NSW had plenty of reason to celebrate after their last State of Origin decider at Brisbane's Suncorp Stadium.

item.title: Telstra outage: Time-keeping tech in telco data centres revealed as cause for chaos nationally
item.description: Train services, emergency calls and traffic lights have all been affected.

item.title: Father of GRL singer Lauren Bennett issues heartbreaking statement following shock death
item.description: She performed in two girl groups before featuring on one of the biggest hits of the 2010s

item.title: Telstra outage affects Chargefox EV charging network across Australia
item.description: A nationwide mobile data outage has impacted one of Australia's largest electric vehicle charging networks.

item.title: Former Australian Test cricketer Stuart MacGill fails to quash coke supply conviction
item.description: The judge has made his decision after the former Australian cricketer objected to details of his drug supply conviction.

item.title: Bentley's first EV now has a name
item.description: Bentley has announced its first electric vehicle will be called Torcal, an ‘urban SUV’ set to be unveiled later this year, alongside a single teaser image.

item.title: Ovens and Murray Football League player Zac Pethybridge suspended for striking 17-year-old debutant
item.description: The league’s response to the sickening incident has caused outrage within the community.

item.title: Interim Carlton coach Josh Fraser explains reluctance to put hand up for full-time position
item.description: The interim coach continues to be grilled over the situation but now a famous former teammate is backing him in.

item.title: Faye Condon: Girl wrongly given six rounds gruelling chemotherapy after UK health system misdiagnosed her
item.description: ‘Those doctors ruined my little girl’s whole childhood.’

item.title: Richmond fitness boss Ben Serpell departs abruptly amid crippling injury crisis
item.description: The Tigers’ high performance manager leaves the club less than two years after his appointment.

item.title: Virgin accused of refusing disabled twins bathroom access on flight from Brisbane to Bali
item.description: The cabin crew allegedly denied the kids access to the forward aircraft lavatory.

item.title: Foton partners with Ironman, other Aussie and Kiwi firms for new range of Tunland accessories
item.description: Foton has partnered with Ironman 4x4, TriMotive and MTL on a range of factory-backed accessories for its Tunland ute range.

item.title: 2026 MG S5 EV prices: Electric SUV gets more power, longer range
item.description: Model-year 2026 changes give the flagship MG S5 EV more power and greater driving range for the same price.

item.title: Kia discontinues its most luxurious model
item.description: No, the EV9 isn't going anywhere. But Kia is killing off its Genesis-based K9 luxury sedan in Korea, ending a 14-year run of the flagship nameplate.

item.title: Pauline Hanson, Holly Valance reunite in England as One Nation leader hints at major UK talks
item.description: A reunion with Holly Valance, lunch at Jeremy Clarkson’s pub and a promise of ‘big meetings’ has fuelled intrigue around Pauline Hanson’s UK trip.

item.title: Australia to trial AI-powered traffic lights for the first time
item.description: A Queensland council has announced an Australian-first trial of AI-powered traffic signals to reduce grid lock and time spent waiting at red lights.

item.title: Bird flu spread feared after latest SA detection, with KI sea lions in the firing line
item.description: A petrel has been confirmed as Australia’s 8th case as two more are investigated.

item.title: Ross Lyon contradicts himself with ‘imminent’ Max King injury news
item.description: The St Kilda coach tried to be coy before using the exact word he said he wouldn’t.

item.title: The Crash, Netflix: Mackenzie Shirilla appeals Ohio murder conviction in latest bid for release
item.description: Mackenzie Shirilla has shared a new selfie and a message from prison after her shocking case went viral on Netflix’s The Crash.

item.title: Geelong forward Jeremy Cameron makes scathing assessment of own two-kick game against Brisbane
item.description: The Geelong star has shared details of his long drive home and the thoughts that raced through his head.

item.title: Unfiltered: Matt Denny opens up on ‘brutal pill’ after feather’s death
item.description: ‘To walk away from that comp and like having dedicated it to him, that was pretty brutal.’

item.title: Former Afghanistan fast bowler Shapoor Zadran loses health battle a day before 39th birthday
item.description: The much-loved star has been fondly remembered for his ‘courage’ and dedication to the game.

item.title: Three teenagers charged over alleged violent online fight club in Adelaide
item.description: Three teens have been charged and police are vowing there will be more to come.

item.title: Major $250m Pacific Rugby League agreement announced hours before State of Origin decider
item.description: The ‘dream come true’ agreement features a striking detail involving the future of the NRL.

item.title: Matt Nean: Group 4 rugby league player has 20-year ban overturned after decade-long battle
item.description: The emotional comeback has one very special motivation.
